creator: ve@sci.fi
text:
The fetchmail program supports using Kerberos authentication for POP
requests. This service is also referred as KPOP. To enable the KPOP
support une needs to tell configure where to locate the kerberos
files. The enclosed does this.

Fix: Apply this patch to the fetchmail Makefile. The patch was kindly
provided by Benjamin Greenwald <beng@lcs.mit.edu>. He has tested this
patch and the associated changes already applied to the fetchmail
distribution.
How-To-Repeat: 
# cd /usr/ports/fetchmail
# make all install
# exit
% fetchmail -p KPOP
fetchmail: Kerberos V4 support not linked.: Unknown error: -1
